heading: Suspension during war or emergency
label: 3033 Suspension during war or emergency
text: In time of emergency declared by the President or by the Congress, and in time of war, the President is authorized, in the President’s discretion, to suspend the operation of all or any part of the provisions of law pertaining to promotion of commissioned officers of the Administration.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853i(b) of this titlePub. L. 107–372
